title: DP Checklist
heading: Data Processing (DP) QA Checklist
description: Standard checklist items for QAing Data Processing tables and banners.

categories.title: Overall Checks
items: Ensure all tables in specs are accounted for in the tables file vs. DA.
Confirm correct tables are being run for each banner and in the correct order.
Verify Final Data matches Excel Tabs export and custom DVs are built correctly.

categories.title: Table Specifics
items: Check table title and base description match specs.
For single-punch, ensure data sums to total. For multi-punch, sums to > total.
For numerics, verify correct calculations are included and logically make sense.
Verify weighting is properly applied or not applied.

categories.title: Banners & Stat Testing
items: Banner labels match specs and are spelled correctly.
Stat testing letters line up with the correct banner cell (don't include Total cell).

categories.title: Edge Cases
items: Check for labels, specs, or tables that don't make sense and flag for clarification.
Remember that Rapid Choice and IIM Bases may not match base specs because cleaning is done in DP.
